violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted laying on counter in the food prep area on the west side.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the flour sugar etc. Do not use plastic containers as scoops since there is no handles on them.
EMPLOYEE PRACTICES (1 pts): A personal beverage was observed in an improper container. No lids
TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): Toilet room doors on both sides noted not self closing. | TOILET FACILITIES (1 pts): A covered waste receptacle was not provided in the women's toilet room.

FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling tiles in the food prep areas need to be smooth and easily cleanable. | FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors and walls under and around in place equipment noted in need of cleaning.
PREMISES (1 pts): Mops and brooms not hung when not in use on the west side.
